title: Visualizing Higher Order Transition Probabilities in a Markov Chain
description: A state graph showing a Markov Chain with three states and the paths representing the multi-step transitions calculated using the Chapman-Kolmogorov equations.
relationships: Paths from State A to State C via State B show the calculation of a two-step probability: P²(A→C) = Σ P(A→k)*P(k→C)
The P³ matrix represents probabilities for transitions over three steps, calculated as P² * P or P * P²
